title: angelica anomala subsp. sachalinensis
intro: Angelica anomala subsp. sachalinensis, also known as Russian angelica, is a subspecies of the Angelica anomala plant, a perennial herb native to the Russian Far East. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Russian angelica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Russian angelica can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
